# amiHerbAI — Herbal AI Companion
> Dual-engine (Grok + DeepSeek) AI companion for medicinal plants, natural remedies, and phytotherapy.

## What this is
- AI-powered informational companion for herbal medicine topics
- Every answer is cross-verified by two independent AI models
- When models disagree, the system says so honestly instead of guessing
- NOT a medical device, NOT a diagnostic tool, NOT a substitute for professional advice

## Architecture
- Frontend: static HTML on GitHub Pages (amiherbai.com)
- Backend: FastAPI on Railway with dual-engine anti-confabulation
- Payment: Stripe Checkout for Pro subscriptions
- Compliance: EU AI Act (Art. 50 transparency) + GDPR

## What is tested
- Dual-engine concordance verification
- Crisis detection safety layer
- Rate limiting (free: 5/day, server: 20/min)
- Stripe checkout flow

## What is NOT tested
- Long-term subscription management
- Herbal information accuracy (AI-generated, may contain errors)
- All herb-drug interaction coverage

## Contact
hello@amiherbai.com
